continuous_attenuation.boundary_behavior: At |z_h-z*|=tau the capped quadratic penalty is exactly 1 on both one-sided limits; therefore an infinitesimal tau crossing cannot create v3's finite 1-to-0 coherence jump.
continuous_attenuation.formula: p_h=min(1,(abs(z_h-z*)/tau)^2); A_handle=1-mean_h(p_h); A_space=mean_bins(max_h_in_bin(1-p_h)); A_severe=1 for dmax<=2.5tau, smoothstep(3.5-dmax) for 2.5tau<dmax<3.5tau, and 0 for dmax>=3.5tau or structural mixed/conflict/missing evidence; ratio_score=A_handle*exp(-logMAD/tau)*A_space*A_severe; reference_score=span_score*mean_h(1-p_ratio,h)*A_severe

ratio.continuous_formula: p_h=min(1,(abs(z_h-z*)/tau)^2); A_handle=1-mean_h(p_h); A_space=mean_bins(max_h_in_bin(1-p_h)); A_severe=1 for dmax<=2.5tau, smoothstep(3.5-dmax) for 2.5tau<dmax<3.5tau, and 0 for dmax>=3.5tau or structural mixed/conflict/missing evidence; ratio_score=A_handle*exp(-logMAD/tau)*A_space*A_severe; reference_score=span_score*mean_h(1-p_ratio,h)*A_severe

reference.continuous_formula: p_h=min(1,(abs(z_h-z*)/tau)^2); A_handle=1-mean_h(p_h); A_space=mean_bins(max_h_in_bin(1-p_h)); A_severe=1 for dmax<=2.5tau, smoothstep(3.5-dmax) for 2.5tau<dmax<3.5tau, and 0 for dmax>=3.5tau or structural mixed/conflict/missing evidence; ratio_score=A_handle*exp(-logMAD/tau)*A_space*A_severe; reference_score=span_score*mean_h(1-p_ratio,h)*A_severe

continuous_attenuation.boundary_behavior: The O2 Tier-A floor is 0.05+0.20*(d/L)^2 on its sealed interval, so the value and both one-sided limits agree at d=tau; Tier-B hard classes use the separately sealed closed-world boundary.
continuous_attenuation.formula: q_ratio=Q_clean_support*product_s(1-floor_s); q_reference=Q_clean_span_support*product_ratio_s(1-floor_s)*product_span_s(1-floor_s); floors are per suspicious signal and contain no candidate-count denominator; Tier B affected paths are exactly 0/NONE

ratio.continuous_formula: q_ratio=Q_clean_support*product_s(1-floor_s); q_reference=Q_clean_span_support*product_ratio_s(1-floor_s)*product_span_s(1-floor_s); floors are per suspicious signal and contain no candidate-count denominator; Tier B affected paths are exactly 0/NONE

reference.continuous_formula: q_ratio=Q_clean_support*product_s(1-floor_s); q_reference=Q_clean_span_support*product_ratio_s(1-floor_s)*product_span_s(1-floor_s); floors are per suspicious signal and contain no candidate-count denominator; Tier B affected paths are exactly 0/NONE
